reading_rate.title: Reading Rate
reading_rate.description: Playback speed for the screen-reader audio (e.g. 1.0 = normal, 1.5 = 1.5× speed).

ai_client.title: AI Client
ai_client.description: Which AI backend to use for code explanations and AI magics.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Your Google Gemini API key. Required when AI Client is set to 'gemini'.
